embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

embeds.title: 🔥 LOOT ROUTE POINTS SHOP 🔥

footer.text: 💎 To redeem prizes: >lootroutesredeem | Total Points: 169.25 | Updated: 2026-05-29 07:35 UTC

fields.value:
🌊 **🌊 Free Pro Surge Route!**
└─ `11 Loot Route Points` - Get a professional surge route created for FREE!

💰 **💰 Free Pro Loot Route!**
└─ `20 Loot Route Points` - Get a professional loot route created for FREE!

🌊 **🌊 Wave Contributor Role!**
└─ `22 Loot Route Points` - Receive the Wave Contributor role!

⭐ **⭐ Paid Priority Role!**
└─ `23 Loot Route Points` - Receive the Paid Priority role!
fields.name: 🎁 AVAILABLE PRIZES 🎁

fields.value:
💎 **💎 800 VBucks Item Gift from Frus!**
└─ `25 Loot Route Points` - Receive an 800 VBucks gift item from Frus himself!

🎯 **🎯 Free Pro Drop Map!**
└─ `35 Loot Route Points` - Get a professional drop map created for FREE!

📢 **📢 @everyone Announcement Ping!**
└─ `100 Loot Route Points` - Post a message with @everyone in the Drop Map server announcements!

👑 **👑 VIP Role!**
└─ `150 Loot Route Points` - Receive the VIP role!
fields.name: ​

fields.value:
**⚡ Within 12 hours** → `2.5 Loot Route Points`
**⚡ Within 24 hours** → `2 Loot Route Points`
**🏃 Within 48 hours** → `1 Loot Route Point`
**🚶 Within 3 days** → `0.5 Loot Route Points`
**🚶 Within 4 days** → `0 Loot Route Points`
**💀 Over 4 days** → `-1 pt penalty (then -1 more per extra day)`
*e.g. 5 days = −2 pts, 6 days = −3 pts...*

👑 **Head Loot Routes Bonus:** `2x multiplier` on all positive points earned!
fields.name: 💰 HOW TO EARN LOOT ROUTE POINTS

fields.value: Please note any rewards you get during your time here must be redeemed whilst you are still here + in a reasonable period of time.
fields.name: ⚠️ Important Note

embeds.description:
**Complete routes, earn Loot Route Points, claim INSANE rewards!**

This channel is where every loot route you make will be documented. The amount of points you get per map depends on how fast you complete the Loot Route. The time is calculated from the time we assign the route until the time you send the finished & final copy.

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s
